description.ko: 유리 프리즘을 통과하는 빛이 선명한 무지개빛 스펙트럼으로 분산되는 놀라운 시각화입니다. 이 작품은 광학 물리학의 복잡한 아름다움과 굴절된 빛의 순수함을 포착합니다.
description.en: A stunning visualization of light passing through a glass prism, breaking into a vibrant spectrum of colors. This piece captures the intricate beauty of optical physics and the purity of refracted light.

prompt: Macro photography of a high-quality crystal prism on a clean white surface, a single beam of intense white light entering and refracting into a vivid, sharp rainbow spectrum, caustic light patterns, hyper-realistic glass textures, volumetric lighting, 8k resolution, cinematic composition, optical physics, chromatic aberration.
